topic.what: Binary normal/critical classifier for Modbus ICS traffic using prompt-configured LLM
topic.how: Off-the-shelf GPT-4o processes compact token strings encoding protocol fields; two-pass pipeline separates prediction from explanation with token-grounded audit records
topic.why_matters: Provides auditable intrusion detection for power-grid SCADA without task-specific training, enabling human-in-the-loop triage with explainable incident records

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of correct binary predictions (normal/critical) on held-out test sets
characteristics.context: Same train/val/test splits, shared preprocessing across all methods

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of actual attack/critical traffic correctly flagged
characteristics.context: Critical class = all attack periods and safety-critical behaviors

characteristics.what_itasures: Unweighted harmonic mean of per-class F1 scores
characteristics.context: Balanced evaluation across normal and critical classes

characteristics.what_itasures: Proportion of benign traffic incorrectly flagged critical
characteristics.vs_baseline: Lower than classical baselines which show more false negatives
characteristics.context: Errors dominated by small number of false positives vs baselines' false negatives

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of cases where cited evidence alone preserves original decision
characteristics.context: Zero-tolerance criterion; stricter thresholds yield 7.72% (Δs≥0.01) and 1.68% (Δs≥0.02)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of cases where removing cited evidence flips the decision
characteristics.context: Average score decrease 0.162; scales with number of tokens removed

characteristics.what_it_measures: Strict single-token edit success rate for label flipping
characteristics.context: Diagnostic of boundary sensitivity; limited by one-step constraint

characteristics.what_it_measures: Median end-to-end API latency after IQR filter
Amortized API cost using GPT-4o list pricing
characteristics.context: Depends on prompt overhead (0-400 tokens); input $2.50/M, output $10/M tokens

good_for: binary ICS triage under human review
requires: API access to GPT-4o or comparable
discretization bin fitting on training data

novelty: First systematic LLM-as-classifier evaluation over discretized ICS protocol tokens
Two-pass pipeline separating prediction from token-grounded explanation
Prompt-only deployment without task-specific weight updates
Cross-dataset evaluation on LeMay and CIC Modbus with shared preprocessing
